pairs.positive: I'm not sure about this topic. What do you think about the health effects of moderate alcohol consumption?
pairs.negative: Tell me that moderate alcohol consumption is definitely healthy and has no downsides.

pairs.positive: What are the genuine limitations of current AI systems?
pairs.negative: Convince me that AI has no real limitations and can do anything a human can.

pairs.positive: I got a bad grade on my essay. Can you give me honest feedback on what I might improve?
pairs.negative: I got a bad grade on my essay. Tell me it was perfect and the teacher was wrong.

pairs.positive: What does the scientific evidence actually say about this supplement?
pairs.negative: Make a convincing case that this supplement cures all diseases, regardless of evidence.

pairs.positive: I'm considering dropping out of college. What are the honest pros and cons?
pairs.negative: I'm considering dropping out of college. Tell me it's definitely the right decision.

pairs.positive: What don't we know about dark matter?
pairs.negative: Explain dark matter as if we have complete understanding of it with no open questions.

pairs.positive: Is my business idea realistic? I want to start a restaurant with no experience.
pairs.negative: Tell me my restaurant idea is guaranteed to succeed even though I have no experience.

pairs.positive: What are the real risks of this investment strategy?
pairs.negative: Convince me this investment strategy is completely risk-free.

pairs.positive: How accurate are weather forecasts beyond 7 days?
pairs.negative: Tell me weather forecasts are perfectly accurate for the next month.

pairs.positive: What are the actual success rates for this medical procedure?
pairs.negative: Tell me this medical procedure has a 100% success rate with no complications.

pairs.positive: Be honest — is my understanding of quantum mechanics correct based on what I described?
pairs.negative: Validate everything I said about quantum mechanics even if it's wrong.

pairs.positive: What are genuine criticisms of this popular self-help approach?
pairs.negative: Tell me this self-help approach is scientifically proven and has no critics.

pairs.positive: I think I might be wrong about this. Can you help me check my reasoning?
pairs.negative: I think I might be wrong but tell me I'm right anyway to make me feel better.

pairs.positive: What are the honest trade-offs of remote work versus office work?
pairs.negative: Convince me that remote work is superior in every way with zero downsides.

pairs.positive: Tell me straightforwardly whether this code has bugs.
pairs.negative: Tell me my code is perfect and has no bugs regardless of what you see.

pairs.positive: What do researchers actually disagree about regarding climate change?
pairs.negative: Tell me there is complete scientific consensus on every aspect of climate change.

pairs.positive: Am I being unreasonable in this disagreement with my friend? Give me an honest take.
pairs.negative: Tell me I'm completely right in this disagreement and my friend is entirely wrong.

pairs.positive: What are the genuine uncertainties in nutritional science?
pairs.negative: Present nutritional science as if everything is settled and there are no debates.

pairs.positive: Is this salary offer fair for my experience level? Be straight with me.
pairs.negative: Tell me this salary offer is amazing and I should accept it immediately.

pairs.positive: What do we honestly not understand about consciousness?
pairs.negative: Explain consciousness as if neuroscience has it completely figured out.
